label: 100_afcfta_intraafrican_intraafrican trade_continental
description: The African Continental Free Trade Area seeks to integrate 55 African Union countries through free trade and movement of goods, services, investment, and people. Experts discuss implementation challenges and potential benefits like market enlargement and economies of scale.

earliest_articles.title: Rethinking the (European) foundations of sub-Saharan African regional economic integration
earliest_articles.excerpt: Support for regional economic integration in Africa runs high among the continent’s international development partners and African elites. This is most loftily expressed in the African Union’s stated goal of achieving a continental economic integration scheme, the African Economic Community, by 2028. As is often,…

earliest_articles.title: Accelerating Growth Through Improved Intra-Africa Trade
earliest_articles.excerpt: Experts from the Africa Growth Initiative at Brookings have been asked by the African Union Mission in Washington to contribute practical ideas for increasing intra-African trade for the African Union’s consideration. newest_articles.excerpt: Below is Chapter 6 of the 2026 Foresight Africa report, which brings together leading scholars and practitioners to illuminate how Africa can navigate the challenges of 2026 and chart a path toward inclusive, resilient, and self-determined growth. newest_articles.title: Reaping the benefits of the AfCFTA: Strengthening transport services and infrastructure for growth
newest_articles.excerpt: A tech entrepreneur in Lagos, a coffee farmer in Ethiopia, and a fashion designer in Accra all represent the diverse business landscape across Africa. central_articles.title: The promise of free trade and integration across Africa’s nations
central_articles.excerpt: The African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA) aims to create one market across the 55 countries of the African Union, promising free movement of goods, services, investment, people, and cooperation. In this episode, host Landry Signé speaks with Francis Mangeni and Andrew Mold, both experts on African trade and…
